metadata.title: MEYNG | AI Infrastructure for African Languages
metadata.description: MEYNG builds the translation APIs, NLP tools, and language models that power applications across Africa. Starting with Sango. Scaling to the continent.
metadata.ogDescription: The AI infrastructure company for African languages. Production-grade translation APIs, NLP tools, and language models.

hero.title: Building the Language Layer
hero.description: We build the translation APIs, NLP tools, and language models that power applications across the continent. Production-grade AI infrastructure for the world's most underserved languages.

flagship.sectionTitle: SangoAI — The First AI Platform for Sango
flagship.sectionDescription: The world's only AI-powered translation and language platform for Sango, the national language of the Central African Republic. 5M+ speakers, zero competitors.
features: Production REST API with tiered pricing
Conversational AI with advanced language models
Open-source NLP toolkit for Sango processing
Fine-tuned language model with published datasets

market.sectionDescription: Africa has 2,000+ languages. Less than 5% have any NLP tools. We're building the infrastructure to change that.

techStack.sectionDescription: Not a research project. A production system processing real requests, serving real users, deployed on enterprise-grade infrastructure.

api.title: Translation API
api.description: RESTful API with tiered access (Free/Startup/Business/Enterprise), quota management, usage analytics, and developer dashboard. Enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure.

nlp.title: NLP Toolkit
nlp.description: Open-source Sango language processing: tokenizer, language detection, stemmer, and morphological analysis. Available as a published open-source package.

model.title: Language Models
model.description: Custom fine-tuned language models for Sango tasks. 760+ word parallel corpus (Sango-French-English). Published openly for the AI research community.

deploy.title: Deployment Proof
deploy.description: eNdara WhatsApp learning bot live on Meta Platform since April 2026. Real-world deployment serving users across Central Africa. Proof that our AI works beyond the browser.

roadmap.sectionDescription: Starting with Sango. Expanding to 5 languages covering 66M+ speakers. The same infrastructure scales to every African language.

api.label: Developer API
api.title: Built for developers
api.description: Integrate African language AI directly into your applications. Simple REST endpoints, predictable pricing, production-grade reliability.

cta.title: Ready to bring AI to
cta.description: Whether you're an investor, enterprise partner, government agency, or NGO — we'd love to explore how MEYNG can power your language needs.

products.sectionDescription: From production APIs to open-source NLP tools, we build the complete language AI stack. SangoAI is our flagship — proving the model before scaling across the continent.

sangoai.description: The world's only AI-powered translation and language platform for Sango. Production REST API, real-time translation, conversational AI, and gamified learning — backed by our open-source NLP toolkit and published models.
features: Production REST API with tiered pricing

sangoaiFull.description: The world's only AI-powered translation and language platform for Sango, the national language of the Central African Republic spoken by 5M+ people. SangoAI provides a production REST API with tiered pricing, real-time AI translation, conversational AI chat, gamified learning with XP and levels, and a developer dashboard — backed by our open-source NLP toolkit and published language models.
features: Production REST API with quota management
Fine-tuned language models with published datasets

endara.description: WhatsApp-based Sango learning bot live on Meta Platform. Any user can message to learn Sango vocabulary — proving our AI works in real-world, low-bandwidth deployments.
features: SMS fallback for areas without internet

endaraFull.description: eNdara is a WhatsApp-based Sango learning bot live on Meta Platform since April 2026. Users can interact with the bot to learn Sango vocabulary through interactive lessons. Deployed on production infrastructure with high availability. Proves our language AI works in real-world, low-bandwidth environments across Central Africa.
features: Live on Meta Platform since April 2026
SMS-based vocabulary lessons via Africa's Talking

obetrack.description: Smart PWA using AI-powered food recognition and barcode scanning to track inventory, predict expiry, and reduce food waste for households and businesses.
features: AI recipe generation from expiring items

obetrackFull.description: A progressive web app that combines AI-powered food recognition, barcode scanning, and smart expiry predictions to help households, restaurants, and businesses eliminate food waste. Part of the MEYNG product portfolio — demonstrating our AI capabilities beyond language.
features: Barcode scanning for instant product entry
AI recipe generation from expiring ingredients

products.ctaTitle: Ready to integrate African language AI?
products.ctaDescription: Whether you need translation APIs for your app, language data for research, or custom NLP solutions — let's talk.

values.sectionDescription: We're not competing in a crowded market. We're creating a new one — AI infrastructure for the most underserved languages on Earth.

firstMover.title: Zero Competition
firstMover.description: SangoAI is the only AI translation platform for Sango. No Google Translate, no DeepL, no open-source alternative. First-mover advantage in a 5M+ speaker market.

production.title: Production, Not Research
production.description: Live API serving real requests. Published models and datasets. WhatsApp bot deployed on a global messaging platform. This isn't a paper — it's infrastructure you can integrate today.

scalable.title: Built to Scale
scalable.description: The same architecture that powers Sango scales to any language. Lingala, Wolof, Bambara — each new language is infrastructure, not a rebuild. 2,000+ languages await.

about.sectionTitle: The AI Infrastructure Company for African Languages
about.sectionDescription: We build the translation APIs, NLP tools, and language models that enable organizations to operate in African languages at scale.
about.missionDescription: To build production-grade AI infrastructure for every African language — starting with the most underserved. We believe the next billion internet users will speak languages that AI doesn't understand yet. MEYNG is building the bridge.
about.visionDescription: A future where every African language has production-quality NLP tools — translation APIs, speech recognition, and language models — accessible to any developer, organization, or government that needs them.
about.whyDescription: Africa has 2,000+ languages spoken by 1.4 billion people. Less than 5% have basic NLP tools. Google Translate supports 133 languages — fewer than 25 are African. This isn't a niche. It's the largest untapped market in language AI.

technical.title: Technical Moat
technical.description: Proprietary training data, fine-tuned models, and production infrastructure that took years to build. You can't replicate this with a weekend hackathon.

cultural.title: Cultural Authority
cultural.description: Founded by a Central African native speaker with deep linguistic expertise. Our data quality comes from cultural understanding, not just computation.

firstMover.title: First-Mover Lock-In
firstMover.description: First to publish Sango NLP tools, first to deploy a Sango AI API, first to ship a WhatsApp bot for Sango learning. Network effects compound.

partnerships.title: Strategic Positioning
partnerships.description: Built on world-class foundation models, published openly for AI community visibility, deployed on the world's largest messaging platform for maximum reach across Africa.

founder.name: Michel WENEZOUI
founder.bio: Software engineer and AI entrepreneur. Native Sango speaker from the Central African Republic. Built SangoAI from zero to production — scalable cloud infrastructure, published NLP toolkit, and fine-tuned language models. Based in Paris.

founded.title: MEYNG Founded
founded.description: Incorporated in Paris. Began building the first Sango NLP pipeline and training data collection.

sangoaiLaunch.title: SangoAI Goes Live
sangoaiLaunch.description: Production API deployed on cloud infrastructure. Translation, chat, and learning platform launched at sangoai.sbs with enterprise-grade scalability.

apiPublished.title: AI Assets Published
apiPublished.description: Open-source NLP toolkit published for developers. Fine-tuned language model and 760-word parallel corpus released openly. Sango becomes a documented NLP language.

metaLive.title: WhatsApp Bot on Meta Platform
metaLive.description: eNdara learning bot published on Meta. Any WhatsApp user can message to learn Sango. First real-world deployment proof beyond web.

about.ctaDescription: We're raising pre-seed funding to scale from 1 language to 5, hire our first NLP engineers, and close our first enterprise contracts. The market is massive, the timing is now.

contact.sectionDescription: Whether you're an investor, enterprise partner, government agency, NGO, or developer — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.contactIntro: MEYNG is actively seeking strategic partners, investors, and early adopter customers. We respond to every inquiry.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at contact@meyng.com.
contact.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MEYNG ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website meyng.com.
privacy.collectDescription: We may collect the following types of information:
collectItems: Contact information (name, email address) when you submit our contact form
Usage data such as pages visited, time on site, and referring URL via analytics tools
Technical information such as browser type, device type, and IP address
privacy.useDescription: We use the information we collect to:
useItems: Respond to your inquiries and messages
Communicate with you about our products and updates
privacy.sharingDescription: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us with website operations, form processing, and hosting, subject to confidentiality agreements.
privacy.cookiesDescription: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some features may not function properly.
privacy.securityDescription: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.rightsDescription: Under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR), you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@meyng.com.
privacy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at contact@meyng.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully before using the website meyng.com operated by MEYNG ("we", "us", or "our").
terms.acceptanceDescription: By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.
terms.useDescription: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe on the rights of others or restrict their use of the site.
terms.ipDescription: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of MEYNG or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.
terms.productsDescription: Information about our products and services is provided for informational purposes. Product features, availability, and pricing are subject to change without notice.
terms.disclaimerDescription: This website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.
terms.liabilityDescription: To the maximum extent permitted by law, MEYNG shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website.
terms.governingDescription: These Terms are governed by the laws of France. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
terms.changesDescription: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.contactDescription: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at contact@meyng.com.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies and Google Analytics to understand how our site is used and improve the experience. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties.

footer.description: The AI infrastructure company for African languages. We build the translation APIs, NLP tools, and language models that power applications across the continent.
